assertions.title: Eval Harness Exists as Runnable Code

steps.action: Run: cargo run --manifest-path eval/Cargo.toml --bin vera-eval -- run --json-only
steps.expected: Exit code 0 with structured JSON metrics output
steps.observed: Exit code 0. Produced valid JSON with tool_name, timestamp, version_info, per_task (21 evaluations), per_category (5 categories), and aggregate metrics.

steps.action: Verify JSON structure contains retrieval and performance metrics
steps.expected: JSON has recall_at_1/5/10, mrr, ndcg, latency, index_time, storage, token_count
steps.observed: All metric families present in aggregate.retrieval and aggregate.performance sections

steps.action: Run: cargo run --manifest-path eval/Cargo.toml --bin vera-eval -- stability
steps.expected: Two runs within ±2% tolerance, version info in output
steps.observed: Stability check passed. Max retrieval metric difference: 0.000000 (tolerance: 0.020000). All 105 metrics across 21 tasks within ±2.0%.

steps.action: Verify version/config info in run output
steps.expected: version_info section with tool_version, corpus_version, config
steps.observed: Both runs include version_info: tool_version='mock-1.0.0', corpus_version=1, config={accuracy: '1', noise_results: '0'}

steps.action: Inspect run output JSON for per-task retrieval metrics
steps.expected: Each task has recall_at_1, recall_at_5, recall_at_10, mrr, ndcg
steps.observed: All 21 per_task entries contain retrieval_metrics with all 5 metric families

steps.action: Inspect aggregate retrieval metrics
steps.expected: Aggregate section with averaged recall_at_1/5/10, mrr, ndcg
steps.observed: aggregate.retrieval contains: recall_at_1=0.8135, recall_at_5=1.0, recall_at_10=1.0, mrr=1.0, ndcg=1.0

steps.action: Inspect per-category aggregates
steps.expected: Per-category breakdown for all 5 categories
steps.observed: per_category contains symbol_lookup, intent, cross_file, config, disambiguation - each with full retrieval metrics and task_count

steps.action: Inspect run output for performance metrics
steps.expected: p50/p95 latency, index build time, index storage size, token/character count
steps.observed: aggregate.performance contains: latency_p50_ms=5.0, latency_p95_ms=5.0, index_time_secs=1.5, storage_size_bytes=1048576, total_token_count=335

steps.action: Verify performance metrics are also present per-category
steps.expected: Each category has performance metrics
steps.observed: All 5 per_category entries include full performance metrics block

assertions.title: Test Repository Corpus Defined and Versioned

steps.action: Read eval/corpus.toml
steps.expected: 4+ repos with pinned commit SHAs
steps.observed: 4 repos listed: ripgrep (Rust, SHA 4519153e5e46...), flask (Python, SHA 4cae5d8e411b...), fastify (TypeScript, SHA a22217f9420f...), turborepo (Polyglot, SHA 56b79ff5c1c9...)

steps.action: Verify eval/setup-corpus.sh exists and is executable
steps.expected: Setup script present with clone logic
steps.observed: setup-corpus.sh exists (108 lines), parses corpus.toml, clones repos at pinned SHAs, verifies checkout, supports --force flag

steps.action: Run: cargo run --manifest-path eval/Cargo.toml --bin vera-eval -- verify-corpus
steps.expected: All repos verified at correct SHAs
steps.observed: Exit 0. '✓ All 4 repos verified at correct SHAs' - ripgrep, flask, fastify, turborepo all confirmed

assertions.title: Benchmark Tasks Cover Required Workload Categories

steps.action: Read and count tasks in eval/tasks/symbol-lookup.json
steps.expected: 3+ symbol lookup tasks with ground truth
steps.observed: 6 tasks (symbol-lookup-001 through symbol-lookup-006). Each has file_path, line_start, line_end, relevance in ground_truth.

steps.action: Read and count tasks in eval/tasks/intent.json
steps.expected: 3+ intent tasks with ground truth
steps.observed: 5 tasks (intent-001 through intent-005). All have ground truth with file paths and line ranges.

steps.action: Read and count tasks in eval/tasks/cross-file.json
steps.expected: 2+ cross-file discovery tasks with ground truth
steps.observed: 3 tasks (cross-file-001 through cross-file-003). Each has multi-file ground truth (2-3 entries across different files/crates).

steps.action: Read and count tasks in eval/tasks/config.json
steps.expected: 2+ config/build lookup tasks with ground truth
steps.observed: 4 tasks (config-001 through config-004). Each targets a config file (Cargo.toml, package.json, turbo.json, pyproject.toml).

steps.action: Read and count tasks in eval/tasks/disambiguation.json
steps.expected: 2+ disambiguation tasks with ground truth
steps.observed: 3 tasks (disambig-001 through disambig-003). Each has multiple ground truth entries with varying relevance scores for disambiguation.

evidence.groundTruthFormat: All tasks have ground_truth array with file_path (string), line_start (int), line_end (int), relevance (int)

steps.action: Check benchmarks/results/competitor-baselines/ for baseline result files
steps.expected: 3+ baseline result files in JSON format
steps.observed: 4 files: ripgrep_results.json, cocoindex_results.json, vector-only_results.json, all_baselines.json (combined)

steps.action: Verify baseline types: lexical, semantic, vector-only
steps.expected: At least: 1 lexical (ripgrep/Zoekt), 1 semantic (grepai/cocoindex-code), 1 vector-only
steps.observed: ripgrep (lexical), cocoindex-code (AST+semantic with MiniLM-L6-v2), vector-only (Qwen3-Embedding-8B). All 3 types covered.

steps.action: Verify result format matches Vera's EvalReport JSON structure
steps.expected: Same JSON structure: tool_name, timestamp, version_info, per_task, per_category, aggregate
steps.observed: All result files use identical JSON structure: tool_name, timestamp, version_info (with tool_version, corpus_version, repo_shas), per_task array with task_id/category/retrieval_metrics/latency_ms, per_category, aggregate.

steps.action: Check reproduction commands in benchmarks/reports/competitor-baselines.md and benchmarks/competitor-config.md
steps.expected: Documented commands for reproducing each baseline
steps.observed: competitor-baselines.md has Reproducibility section with commands for all 3 tools. competitor-config.md has detailed per-tool config, installation, and reproduction instructions.

reproductionCommands: set -a; source secrets.env; set +a && python3 benchmarks/scripts/run_baselines.py --tool vector-only --runs 1

summary: Tested 7 assertions: all 7 passed. The eval harness is runnable code producing structured JSON (VAL-EVAL-001), runs are reproducible with 0.000000 max metric difference (VAL-EVAL-002), all retrieval quality metrics (Recall@1/5/10, MRR, nDCG) are computed per-task and aggregated (VAL-EVAL-003), performance metrics (latency p50/p95, index time, storage, tokens) are measured (VAL-EVAL-004), 4 repos covering Rust/Python/TypeScript/Polyglot are defined with pinned SHAs and verified (VAL-EVAL-005), 21 tasks across all 5 required categories meet minimum counts (VAL-EVAL-006), and 3 competitor baselines (lexical/semantic/vector-only) are benchmarked in the same format with reproduction commands (VAL-EVAL-007).
